login.title: Front Desk
login.totpHint: Enter the code from your authenticator app
login.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts, wait a moment and try again

members.title: Members
members.empty: No members yet. Add your first Model Hotel instance below.
members.tokenHint: Stored encrypted. Needed for version and traffic readings, and for admin-token sync.
members.removeBody: Front Desk stops tracking {{name}} and removes it from the Traefik backend pool. The instance itself is not touched. This does not drain in-flight requests; drain first for zero-loss removal.
members.firstMemberPrimary: This is your first member, so it is the default sync primary: its admin token becomes the whole group's admin token when you run a sync. Make sure you have it written down.
members.errHttpsRequired: URLs must use https. Set FRONTDESK_ALLOW_HTTP_MEMBERS=true on the Front Desk container to allow plain http on a trusted internal network.
members.errDuplicate: A member with this URL already exists.

traffic.title: Traffic
traffic.intro: Per-member request and error rates, pulled from each member's own metrics. Use it to confirm load is actually being distributed.
traffic.noTokenMembers: Traffic needs a stored admin token for each member. Add a token on the Members tab to chart that member here.
traffic.empty: No members with a stored admin token yet.
traffic.unreachable: Could not read metrics from this member

settings.title: Settings
settings.pollSectionHint: These regenerate the Traefik config that the data plane polls.
settings.traefikStaleHint: Warn when Traefik has not fetched the config within this window.
settings.retryHint: Retries that failed before any response byte (safe to retry).
settings.stickyHint: Pin a browser dashboard (and its SSE stream) to one instance.
settings.tokenSectionHint: This is your Front Desk UI login (FRONTDESK_TOKEN). It is separate from members' admin tokens and is not changed by the actions below.
settings.syncIntro: Converge every member's dashboard admin token onto one primary's. Every other member is made to accept the primary's admin token; their current tokens stop working immediately.
settings.syncBlocked: Cannot sync — no stored admin token, add one first
settings.syncConfirmBody: This overwrites the admin token on each member listed below. Their current admin tokens stop working immediately; afterward you log in (and reach them via the load balancer) with the primary's token. This is only reversible by re-syncing or manually resetting a member.
settings.syncAck: I understand these members' tokens will be overwritten
settings.resetIntro: Generate a brand-new group admin token and push it to every member. Use this when the current token is lost. The new token is shown once.
settings.resetConfirmTitle: Reset the admin token for all members?
settings.resetConfirmBody: This generates a NEW admin token and replaces it on every member listed below. The current tokens stop working immediately and the new token is shown only once. Members Front Desk cannot currently reach are skipped and keep their old token.
settings.resetAck: I understand all members' tokens will be replaced
settings.resetRevealBody: Save this now. It is shown only once and cannot be retrieved again. It is the admin token for every member's dashboard and the load-balanced hostname.

errors.unauthorized: Your session expired, please sign in again
